ValidationRule.description: On Billing forms with Extension requests, the field 'Next Renewal Date' from the related account must be filled, as this is in use in the billing Zendesk Prioritization tickets.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
( (ISBLANK(Account__r.fr_Next_Renewal_Date__c) && NOT(ISBLANK( Account__c )) || (ISBLANK( Opportunity__r.Account.fr_Next_Renewal_Date__c ) && NOT(ISBLANK( Opportunity__c )))) )
&& ISPICKVAL( Request_Type__c , "Extensions request")
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please validate that the field ' Next Renewal Date' on the related account is populated
